flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at New York Institute of Technology rose 19% between 2006 and 2009 ($20.4k → $24.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at New York Institute of Technology rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.8k → $46.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at New York Institute of Technology fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).
